ddls:
CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the security */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the security */,
  "security_type" TEXT /* Type of security (e.g., equity, bond, derivative) */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Name of the issuer of the security */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date for bonds */,
  "coupon_rate" REAL /* Coupon rate for bonds */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* Strike price for derivatives */,
  "contract_size" INTEGER /* Contract size for derivatives */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the security is denominated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security involved in the transaction */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the security traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the security was traded */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "settlement_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction is settled */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the transaction */,
  "trade_side" TEXT /* Side of the trade (buy/sell) */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, executed, settled) */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trade */,
  "counterparty" TEXT /* Name or ID of the counterparty involved in the trade */,
  "trade_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the trade */,
  "settlement_currency" TEXT /* Currency for settlement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settlements" (
  "settlement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each settlement */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being settled */,
  "quantity_settled" INTEGER /* Quantity of the security that has been settled */,
  "settlement_date" TEXT /* Date when the settlement occurred */,
  "settlement_status" TEXT /* Status of the settlement (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "settlement_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the settlement */,
  "settlement_currency" TEXT /* Currency for settlement */,
  "settlement_amount" REAL /* Amount settled */,
  "settlement_counterparty" TEXT /* Name or ID of the counterparty involved in the settlement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("settlement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settlements_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the security */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the price was recorded */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the security on the recorded date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the security on the recorded date */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the security on the recorded date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the security on the recorded date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the security on the recorded date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, settlement officer, compliance officer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_users" (
  "transaction_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between a transaction and a user */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the transaction */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role of the user in the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_users_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance log */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction that was checked */,
  "compliance_check" TEXT /* Result of the compliance check */,
  "date_checked" TEXT /* Date when the compliance check was performed */,
  "compliance_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compliance officer who performed the check */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed notes or comments about the compliance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_logs_compliance_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("compliance_officer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between a role and a permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between a user and a role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
